checks.command: ADR frontmatter: '---' first line + 6 required keys
ADR Status line names a valid ADR status
ADR authoritative_source equals its own repo-relative path
ADR body contains no unreplaced {{ tokens
product_spec.md Sec 2.1 references both new locations
product_spec.md frontmatter still parses as YAML
docs/architecture/ contains exactly the 1 contracted file

adversarial_check.description: Three-part mandatory check beyond the 9 listed commands. (1) Validated the ADR's frontmatter against schema/frontmatter.schema.json via python3+yaml+jsonschema -- passes cleanly. (2) Diffed the ADR's ## / ### section structure against templates/ADR_TEMPLATE.md's body sections: identical set and identical order (Context, Decision, Consequences/Positive/Negative/Follow-Up Actions, Alternatives Considered) -- zero missing, zero invented sections; separately confirmed the template's leading instructional HTML comment is correctly absent from the shipped ADR (deleted on instantiation, not left in place). (3) Verified product_spec.md Sec 2.1's tree internal consistency: every non-root line uses a sanctioned box-drawing connector (no ASCII substitutes), tools/ correctly switched from '└──' to '├──' now that it has a following sibling, the new validate.sh line is correctly nested as tools/'s sole child ('│   └── '), .github/workflows/ correctly closes the tree as the new final '└── ' entry, comment-column alignment across all 12 top-level entries is identical (column 24, zero spread), and both new lines carry the same '# description (ADR-001)' comment style as their neighbors.
